special_mechanics.name: Overhead/Side-Scrolling Perspective Switching
special_mechanics.description: Game alternates between side-scrolling and overhead perspectives across different level sections

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Options System
special_mechanics.description: Player can collect silver spheres that serve as 'options' to shoot additional pellets. Options can be repositioned via B button to fire forward, sideways, or backward

special_mechanics.name: Firepower Upgrades
special_mechanics.description: Collecting 'F' squares gradually strengthens shots to appear as fire pellets. Up to five can be collected before giving bonus points instead

special_mechanics.name: Screen-Clearing Bombs
special_mechanics.description: Collecting 'B' squares stocks bombs used by pressing Select button. Every life starts with one bomb

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/Qualitative only. Source is Wikipedia gameplay description. No technical physics parameters, ROM values, or quantitative movement data documented. Game is a scrolling shooter with alternating perspectives, not a traditional platformer despite platformer elements. Primary documentation focuses on difficulty, game modes, weapons, and narrative rather than movement mechanics.
